draftNote: 1 of five queued off a bottom-two lane: Cuban Noobster (midlane→carry).

coaching.headline: Two won lanes (Murdock, GRIM) couldn't outpace a lost map — objectives 15-34 and towers 3-11 buried you.
coaching.team: Your bot side actually won: GRIM.exe carry was yours all game (11/4/8) and Murdock flipped the offlane his way from 10 minutes on (9/6/5). But the rest of the map cracked — Zinx mid was behind Renna at every check, Yin lost the jungle to Feng Mao, and you bled objectives 15-34 with towers 3-11. Two fixes carry over: itemize armor (Zinx and Yin both skipped it into a 3-physical comp, and their Sparrow hit 34k), and translate your won lanes into objective pressure before the enemy snowballs the neutral map.
coaching.whatShiftedIt: You won the fights you took bot but never grouped the lead into objectives — the enemy out-took neutrals and out-towered you 11-3. Convert won lanes into Prime/Fangtooth pressure as a five, and build the armor your matchup demanded.

perPlayer.7c8ab99c-31c5-4ea5-a6fa-e0d6417c3f1b: Murdock offlane, 9/6/5 — the Grux lane was even early (first checkpoint) and went yours from ~10 minutes on, which fits your win-rate read (you outscale Grux late). But your first real power spike (Vanquisher ~25m) didn't land until then, so the six deaths almost all come from contesting before you were online. Farm the even early window, then start fighting once Vanquisher is up.
perPlayer.16f28434-561f-4f23-9454-40321f4a1ef3: GRIM.exe carry, 11/4/8 and yours all game vs Sparrow — your best game on the team. With the lane that far ahead and your Imperator spike landing ~36m, the lead was there to close earlier; next time drag that won lane to the objective fights instead of farming it out while the map slips.
perPlayer.a0c393cc-1437-4bdc-8168-64676ce2166c: Zinx mid into Renna was theirs at every checkpoint (behind 5 through 30 minutes) and you only came online around your Oathkeeper spike ~19m — stop taking the 1v1 before then, just farm safe and roam to the bot lanes that were winning. You also ran no armor into a 3-physical enemy comp, so you folded fast in fights; buy it next time.
perPlayer.10edbf65-457d-48d0-9151-9df5b4fcb40a: Phase support, 0/6/20 — 20 assists and team-high mitigation is real frontline work, and your lane only slipped after the first checkpoint (yours at 5m, then theirs). With six deaths, watch the dive after minute 5: once Belica's side took over, ward deeper and peel from range rather than facechecking.
perPlayer.a412baf3-dd17-4f89-8ecf-9d0704f3a79e: Yin jungle, 6/11/6 with eleven deaths — the Feng Mao matchup was even at the first check then theirs the rest of the way, and you never hit a completed-item spike. On a near-first-time hero (5 games), play the early game safe, full-clear to catch up, and like Zinx you skipped armor into a 3-physical comp — that's a big chunk of the deaths.

threats: Chain-CC risk (2 hard-CC abilities, ~1.0s of lockdown): Lt. Belica Neural Disruptor (silence 0.5s), Grux Crush (knockup 0.5s). Don't group tight into it — stagger the engage and hold mobility/cleanse for the key one.
synergy: Little hard CC on your side — you can't force a pick. Play for poke/objectives and punish their cooldowns, don't flip coin-toss 5v5s.
You have sustain (Zinx, Phase) — favor the longer fight where your heals out-grind them.
Strong AoE/teamfight kit — group at choke points and fight on top of objectives.

ourKits.combo: Static Trap root → Buckshot → Hot Pursuit AS → Long Arm of the Law global snipe
ourKits.winCondition: trap for the root, then out-range with Shots Fired and finish with the global ult
ourKits.passive: every 5th basic is a long-range bonus shot
ourKits.playWith: frontline/peel to protect his low mobility
ourKits.playAgainst: almost no escape — engage past the trap and he dies

ourKits.combo: Energy Shield block → Displacement Blast → Assault Mode → GTFO lockon ult
ourKits.winCondition: out-trade with Pulsefire and the spell-shield, finish with GTFO
ourKits.playWith: peel so he can free-cast in Assault Mode
ourKits.playAgainst: bait Energy Shield, then commit; dodge GTFO's slow channel

ourKits.combo: Ricochet stun → Bad Medicine zone → Infuse heal an ally → Neural Regenesis revive
ourKits.winCondition: keep an ally alive with Infuse + the revive ult and poke with Ricochet
ourKits.playWith: a carry she can pocket-heal and revive
ourKits.playAgainst: she can't heal herself — dive HER; bait the revive before committing

ourKits.combo: Telekinetic Link an ally → Psychic Flare blind → Energy Lance → Hyperflux buff ult
ourKits.winCondition: buff a hyper-carry through the Link and Hyperflux for a teamfight
ourKits.passive: abilities heal her and her linked ally
ourKits.playWith: the strongest carry to Link and supercharge
ourKits.playAgainst: kill the linked carry, not Phase; break the link timing

ourKits.combo: Lash Kick gap-close+slow → Windburn %hp basics → Backlash push, Quelling Gale to disengage
ourKits.passive: Rising Storm stacks grant attack speed
ourKits.playWith: a team that lets her side-lane and pick
ourKits.playAgainst: she wants 1v1s — group and burst her; Quelling Gale only stops projectiles

enemyKits.combo: Soulfire waves → Mortal Coil pull-zone → Stupor orb → Abyssal Rift zone
enemyKits.winCondition: zone a fight with Mortal Coil + ult and chunk from range
enemyKits.passive: consumes essences from kills for power
enemyKits.playWith: frontline to hold enemies in her zones
enemyKits.playAgainst: fragile and reliant on her zones — flank/dive around the telegraphs

enemyKits.combo: Seismic Assault knockup → Void Bomb → Neural Disruptor silence ult, Void Drone mana drain
enemyKits.winCondition: knock up + silence a target and burst with missing-HP scaling
enemyKits.playAgainst: dodge Seismic Assault; she's immobile — dive when ult is down

enemyKits.combo: Piercing Shot poke → Heightened Senses AS → Hail of Arrows zone → Inner Fire ult
enemyKits.winCondition: ramp Relentless + AS and sustained-DPS the front down
enemyKits.playWith: heavy peel — she's immobile and pure DPS
enemyKits.playAgainst: she has zero escape — hard-engage her and she dies first

enemyKits.combo: Reaping Dash → Hamstring slows → Safeguard spellshield → Earth Shatter execute
enemyKits.winCondition: trade with the spellshield up and execute low targets with Earth Shatter
enemyKits.passive: permanent power on unique hero takedowns
enemyKits.playWith: setup that holds a target for the execute
enemyKits.playAgainst: bait Safeguard's spellshield before committing your key CC

enemyKits.combo: Smash 'n Grab pull → Crush knockup → Warlord's Challenge stun → bleed-stacked basics
enemyKits.winCondition: land the pull→knockup chain to lock a target while bleed and AS shred them
enemyKits.passive: basics stack a bleed for sustained damage
enemyKits.playWith: follow-up burst inside his knockup/stun window
enemyKits.playAgainst: telegraphed engage — bait Crush/Pull, then punish; kite his slow start
